title: Klutter AI: AI powered expense tracker | Product Hunt
excerpt: Most finance apps help you record expenses. Klutter helps you understand your money. Automatically capture transactions from receipts, SMS, and manual entries. Build budgets, explore spending patterns, receive AI-powered insights, and keep your entire financial life organized in one place. Whether you're tracking daily expenses, planning monthly budgets, or simply trying to gain better financial clarity, Klutter removes the clutter so you can focus on making better decisions.

content_html_zh: 大多数财务应用程序可以帮助您记录费用。 Klutter 帮助您了解您的金钱。自动从收据、短信和手动输入中捕获交易。制定预算、探索支出模式、接收人工智能驱动的见解，并让您的整个财务生活在一个地方井井有条。无论您是跟踪日常支出、规划每月预算，还是只是想获得更好的财务透明度，Klutter 都能消除混乱，以便您可以专注于做出更好的决策。
